info.title: AI Shop Pro Enterprise Backend
info.description:
🏪 Complete retail ERP backend for AI Shop Pro.

Modules: Auth (RBAC), Inventory, Invoices, Khata Ledger, Purchase Orders, Bank Reconciliation, Online Store, Worker Management, Expense Tracker, Enterprise P&L, Retail Intelligence.

get.description:
Get all sales/invoices for a user to restore when app data is cleared.
This endpoint is used by the frontend to download sales history from the cloud.

post.description: Handle legacy frontend sales sync.
Enhanced user registration with password strength validation.

Enhanced login with email/password (not username).
Implements rate limiting and account lockout after failed attempts.

Token refresh with rotation.
Invalidates old refresh token and issues new pair.
Logout current device by invalidating session token.
Logout all devices by invalidating all session and refresh tokens.

get.description: Get all active sessions for a user.

post.description: Refreshes an access token using a valid refresh token (Auto-login for 7 days)
Logs the user out of the current device
Logs the user out of all devices for security

get.description: Returns a list of all active sessions for the user

post.description: Queues offline generated data into the DB for processing
Synchronizes all the offline data that was queued up for the user
Create a new product

get.description: Get all products with optional filtering — only active (non-deleted) products

schema.title: Response Get Products Api Inventory Products Get

get.description: Get product details — account-scoped

delete.description: Soft-delete product — marks inactive, all historical invoices remain intact

post.description: Record stock movement (IN/OUT/ADJUSTMENT)

schema.title: Response Create Stock Movement Api Inventory Stock Movement Post

get.description: Get stock movement history
Get all products below minimum stock
Get detailed stock alerts and recommendations

post.description: Create product batch (for expiry tracking)

get.description: Get all batches for a product
Get batches expiring within specified days
Get total stock value
Get complete inventory status summary

post.description:
Deduct stock with idempotency protection.
This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for stock deduction.
Frontend MUST call this for every stock change.

Batch stock deduction for multiple products in a single transaction.
Used for invoice sync with multiple line items.

Reconcile local inventory cache with backend database.
Detects discrepancies and provides correct values from backend.

get.description:
Get current stock from backend (single source of truth).
Frontend should call this to refresh cache after any operation.

Get all products with current stock from backend.
Frontend should call this to refresh entire inventory cache.

post.description:
Perform full inventory reconciliation between local cache and backend.
Detects discrepancies and provides correction recommendations.

Manually correct stock for a product.
Creates a stock movement record for audit trail.

get.description: Get complete audit trail for a product's stock movements.

post.description:
Automatically fix detected discrepancies by updating local cache with backend values.
This endpoint returns the corrected inventory data that should replace local cache.

Restore complete sales history from backend.
This is called after app reinstall to recover all data.

get.description: Get summary of available sales data for restoration.

post.description: Restore all customer data from backend.
Create a new worker for a shopkeeper

get.description: Get all workers for a shopkeeper

delete.description: Delete a worker from the database

post.description: Employee check-in
Employee check-out
Manually record attendance

get.description: Get attendance records for an employee
Get all attendance records for a specific date

post.description: Request leave

get.description: Get leave requests
Get attendance summary for past N days
Get analytics for specific employee

post.description:
Accept an invoice generated while the app was offline.
This creates the invoice, deducts inventory, and logs revenue.

get.description: Get all invoices for the shop

schema.title: Response Get Invoices Api Invoices  Get

get.description: Get specific invoice details

post.description:
Create a new invoice manually (online mode).
Similar to sync but for real-time invoice creation.

get.description: Get all overdue invoices
Get payments for invoices
Get invoice analytics summary

post.description: Create a new customer

get.description: Get all customers — only active (non-deleted)

schema.title: Response Get Customers Api Customers  Get

get.description: Get customer details

delete.description: Soft-delete a customer (archives them, preserves all their invoice history)

post.description: Set preferred contact method for customer

get.description: Search customer by phone number — active customers only
Search customers by name (partial match) — active customers only

post.description:
Create a new shop profile

Args:
    user_id: ID of the shop owner
    data: Shop profile data

Returns:
    New shop profile with settings

get.description: Get shop profile with all settings

delete.description: Delete shop profile and all settings

put.description: Update shop settings (business hours, tax, payment methods)

post.description: Upload shop logo

get.description: Get shop business hours for a specific day or all days
Get tax configuration for calculating taxes on products
Get the current user's shop profile

post.description: Create the shop profile (one per owner)

get.description:
Generate a UPI QR code for the shop.
Optionally pass ?amount=250.00 to create a fixed-amount QR for an invoice.
Returns a base64 PNG for embedding directly in the app.

post.description: Enable or disable the online store for this shop

get.description: Public endpoint: Returns basic shop info for the Customer app (name, location)

post.description: Record that a customer bought on credit (Udhar/Khata)
Record a customer's partial or full repayment

get.description: List all customers with outstanding Khata balances
Full transaction history for a specific customer

schema.title: Response Get Customer Khata History Khata History  Customer Phone  Get

get.description: Generate a pre-filled WhatsApp reminder URL for a customer with outstanding Khata

post.description: Create a new purchase order to a supplier

get.description: List all purchase orders for this shop

schema.title: Response List Purchase Orders Purchase Orders  Get

post.description:
Mark a PO as delivered.
This AUTOMATICALLY adds received stock quantities to inventory.
Cancel a purchase order
Register a new customer account
Customer login — returns JWT with CUSTOMER role

get.description:
Find shops near a location.
Supports two modes:
1. ?city=Mumbai — simple string matching
2. ?lat=19.0&lng=72.8&radius_km=5 — GPS radius (Haversine formula)
Only returns shops with is_online_store_enabled=True
Browse a shop's available inventory (only active, in-stock products)

post.description: Place an online order at a specific shop

get.description: Customer: View all their orders
Track a specific order by ID
Owner: View all incoming online orders for their shop

post.description: Owner: Accept, Dispatch, Deliver, or Reject an order
Log a shop expense (rent, salary, utilities, etc.)

get.description: List shop expenses with optional date/category filters
List all workers for this shop

post.description: Add a new worker/staff member
Mark salary as paid for a specific month and record in expenses
Record daily UPI vs bank deposit reconciliation

get.description: View bank reconciliation history

Full Profit & Loss summary:
Revenue (sales) - Expenses (all categories) = Net Profit
All Transactions view: every money movement (sales, expenses, khata, PO)
Identify fast-moving and dead-stock items

post.description: Issue a new digital gift card
Redeem or validate a gift card during checkout

get.description: Aggregate all sales for a month and generate GSTR-1 JSON schema

post.description: Feature 17: Set up a timed flash sale across an entire category

get.description: Feature 18: Identify customers who haven't returned recently so you can send them WhatsApp coupons
Feature 19: One-click auto-generation of Purchase Orders broken down by Supplier
Get customer's khata (credit) balance
Get all customers with khata (credit) balances

post.description: Update customer khata balance when invoice is created or payment received - stores transaction history

get.description: Get all shop expenses

Get expense transaction history with optional category filter
Get recent transactions across all types (invoices, payments, expenses) - for Recent Transactions screen
Fetch online (UPI/digital) payments only for last N days
Export all shop data for backup (invoices, khata, expenses, inventory)
Verify data integrity across all critical tables

post.description: Bulk sync sales records from mobile app - PERSISTED TO DB
Bulk sync invoices with line items from mobile app - PERSISTED TO DB
Bulk sync khata balances from mobile app - PERSISTED TO DB
Bulk sync expenses from mobile app - PERSISTED TO DB
Chunked invoice sync - safe for large offline vaults. Send in batches of 100.

delete.description: Soft-delete a product (marks it inactive, preserves history on all old invoices)

get.description: Get cache statistics

post.description: Pre-warm product cache
Pre-warm analytics cache

Bulk import products from CSV file

CSV Format:
    product_name, sku, description, current_stock, unit_price, category
Export all products to CSV

CSV Format:

get.description: Get status of batch operation
Get batch operation history for user
Get current rate limit status for user

post.description:
Check input for security vulnerabilities.
Returns sanitized value and risk assessment.

get.description: Get current rate limit status for client

post.description:
Validate password strength according to security requirements.
Requirements:
- Minimum 8 characters
- At least one uppercase letter
- At least one lowercase letter
- At least one digit
- At least one special character

get.description: Get recommended security headers for the application.

post.description:
Sanitize multiple inputs at once.
Useful for form submissions with multiple fields.

get.description:
Generate a CSRF token for form protection.
In production, this should be stored in session and validated on form submission.

Check if a query contains SQL injection patterns.
For educational and security testing purposes only.

Basic health check endpoint.
Returns overall system health and component status.

Readiness check endpoint.
Checks if the application is ready to serve traffic.

Application metrics endpoint.
Returns performance and business metrics.

post.description:
Structured logging endpoint.
Allows frontend to send structured logs to backend.

Error tracking endpoint.
Captures and logs errors for debugging.

get.description: Performance summary metrics.
Database performance metrics.
Business metrics overview.
